elif.notes: Otherwise If is a mode-1 intermediary conditional with condition fields, not a separate ToolKit action.

else.notes: Plain Otherwise is mode 1 without WFInput/WFCondition/literal fields.

end_if.notes: End If closes the grouped conditional block.

if.notes: Opening conditional action. Every observed string/number condition carries explicit WFInput.

safari_run_java_script_on_active_safari_.name: Run JavaScript on Active Safari Tab

runtimePolicy: Static metadata only. Do not call Apple's private WorkflowKit/ShortcutsLanguage/ShortcutsAgent/ToolRenderer frameworks in production.

diagnosticStrings: Argument does not support lists, please provide a single value.
Match cases must be string or f-string patterns (e.g. `case "option":` or `case f"{variable}":`).
Function symbols must be non-dotted identifiers, such as <function-name>. <module>.<function-name> is only allowed in Shortcuts Language where <function-name> is `append`, and `module` is a variable.
Only keyword arguments are allowed in argument lists.
For loop subjects may only be list-backed variables or `range(n)` expressions for an integer `n` in Shortcuts Language.
The subject of a for loop must be a list-backed variable, or the function `enumerate(<object>)`, or the function `range(<integer>)`.

source: Derived from local macOS 27 Shortcuts ToolKit, ToolRenderer embedded Python surface, WorkflowKit source export, and installed Apple Intelligence shortcut graphs.

sampleShortcuts: Add to List and Otherwise If

is.workflow.actions.additemtolist.name: Add Item to List
sampleShortcuts: Add to List and Otherwise If
is.workflow.actions.additemtolist.summary: Adds the specified item to a list at the beginning, end, or a specific index.

is.workflow.actions.addnewreminder.name: New Reminder

parameters.description: Text representing the date or date and time when the alert should occur. Examples: “tonight at 7”, “March 7”
parameters.label: Time

parameters.description: The location that triggers the alert.
parameters.label: Location

parameters.description: The distance from the provided location to consider "arriving" or "leaving" the location
parameters.label: Radius

parameters.description: The reminder notification will be shown when chatting with this person in Messages.
parameters.label: Person

parameters.description: The list of reminders to add this reminder to.
parameters.label: List

parameters.description: Optionally, a description for this reminder.
parameters.label: Notes

parameters.description: The title of this reminder.
parameters.label: Reminder

parameters.description: An optional set of images to attach to this reminder. Use a variable to get the images.
parameters.label: Images

parameters.description: Optionally, a parent reminder to add this reminder to.
parameters.label: Parent Reminder

parameters.description: Optionally, a URL to attach to this reminder.
parameters.label: URL

is.workflow.actions.addnewreminder.summary: Creates a new reminder and adds it to the selected list of reminders.

is.workflow.actions.adjustdate.name: Adjust Date
is.workflow.actions.adjustdate.summary: Adds or subtracts an amount of time from the date passed into the action.

is.workflow.actions.alert.name: Show Alert
is.workflow.actions.alert.summary: Displays an alert with a title, a message, and two buttons. If the user selects the OK button, the shortcut continues. The cancel button stops the shortcut.

is.workflow.actions.ask.name: Ask for Input
is.workflow.actions.ask.summary: Displays a dialog prompting the user to enter a piece of information.

is.workflow.actions.askllm.name: Use Model

parameters.description: Show the model's response and make additional requests before the final response is passed to the next action.
parameters.label: Follow Up

parameters.description: Allow the model to go out to the web for up-to-date information.
parameters.label: Use Broad World Knowledge

parameters.description:
Responses are automatically optimized for the actions they're passed into — for example, if the response is passed into the 'Repeat with Each' action, the model creates a list.

To manually specify the model's output, select an output type using the 'Output' parameter.

**Private Cloud Compute Models**
Use large server-based models on Private Cloud Compute to handle complex requests while protecting your privacy.

**On-Device Model**
Use the on-device model to handle simple requests without the need for a network connection.

**Extensions**
Apps installed on your device can expose models to Shortcuts, so you can tap into their broad world knowledge and domain expertise. You can enable extensions in Settings > Apple Intelligence & Siri.

Image analysis is supported by the Private Cloud Compute and Extension models, however image generation is not supported.
parameters.label: Output

parameters.description: A request for the model that optionally includes variables and outputs from previous actions, including calendar events, reminders, images, and more.
parameters.label: Request

is.workflow.actions.askllm.summary: Use a model to handle complex requests in your shortcuts.

is.workflow.actions.comment.name: Comment
sampleShortcuts: Add to List and Otherwise If
is.workflow.actions.comment.summary: This action lets you explain how part of a shortcut works. When run, this action does nothing.

is.workflow.actions.date.name: Date
is.workflow.actions.date.summary: Passes the specified date and time to the next action.

is.workflow.actions.dictionary.name: Dictionary
is.workflow.actions.dictionary.summary: Passes the specified list of key-value pairs to the next action as a dictionary.

is.workflow.actions.documentpicker.save.name: Save File

parameters.description: The path to save to, such as "/folder/file.txt"
parameters.label: Subpath

is.workflow.actions.documentpicker.save.summary: Saves files to a specified folder. You can also use this action to copy a file.

is.workflow.actions.downloadurl.name: Get Contents of URL

parameters.description: The HTTP method to use.
parameters.label: Method

is.workflow.actions.downloadurl.summary: Gets the contents of URLs passed into the action. Useful for downloading files and web content, or for making API requests.

is.workflow.actions.file.select.name: Select File
is.workflow.actions.file.select.summary: Prompts to select files or folders.

is.workflow.actions.getitemfromlist.name: Get Item from List
is.workflow.actions.getitemfromlist.summary: Returns one or more items from the list passed as input. You can get the first item, the last item, a random item, the item at a particular index, or items in a range of indexes.

is.workflow.actions.gettext.name: Text
sampleShortcuts: Add to List and Otherwise If
is.workflow.actions.gettext.summary: Passes the specified text to the next action.

is.workflow.actions.getvalueforkey.name: Get Dictionary Value
is.workflow.actions.getvalueforkey.summary: Gets the value for the specified key in the dictionary passed into the action.

is.workflow.actions.getvariable.name: Get Variable
is.workflow.actions.getvariable.summary: Gets the value of the specified variable and passes it to the next action.

is.workflow.actions.list.name: List
sampleShortcuts: Add to List and Otherwise If
is.workflow.actions.list.summary: Allows you to specify a list of items to be passed to the next action.

is.workflow.actions.measurement.convert.name: Convert Measurement
is.workflow.actions.measurement.convert.summary: Converts the measurements passed into the action to the specified unit.

is.workflow.actions.nothing.name: Nothing
sampleShortcuts: Add to List and Otherwise If
is.workflow.actions.nothing.summary: This action does nothing and produces no output. It is useful to separate blocks of actions, or to explicitly pass an empty input to an action.

is.workflow.actions.properties.files.name: Get Details of Files
is.workflow.actions.properties.files.summary: Gets a specific piece of information from the files passed into the action.

is.workflow.actions.runjavascriptforauto.name: Run JavaScript for Mac Automation
is.workflow.actions.runjavascriptforauto.summary: This action executes a JavaScript for Automation (JXA) script.

is.workflow.actions.runjavascriptonwebpa.name: Run JavaScript on Active Safari Tab
is.workflow.actions.runjavascriptonwebpa.summary: Runs JavaScript on a Safari web page passed in as input

is.workflow.actions.runshellscript.name: Run Shell Script

parameters.description:
to stdin: The input will be converted to a file and directed to the stdin pipe of the script.
as arguments: The input will be converted to a list of strings and passed as arguments to the script.
parameters.label: Pass Input

parameters.description: When enabled, Shortcuts will ask for an administrator’s password and run the script as the root user. This is similar to using sudo on the command line.
parameters.label: Run as Administrator

parameters.description: The shell to use for interpreting and running the script.
parameters.label: Shell

is.workflow.actions.runshellscript.summary: This action executes a UNIX shell script. The script will execute starting in your user’s home directory.

is.workflow.actions.runsshscript.name: Run Script Over SSH
is.workflow.actions.runsshscript.summary: Runs a script on a remote computer over SSH.

is.workflow.actions.setitemname.name: Set Name

parameters.description: By default, Shortcuts will automatically include a file extension if one isn't specified. Turn this on if you want to create a file with no extension.
parameters.label: Don't Include File Extension

is.workflow.actions.setitemname.summary: Sets the name of the item passed as input.

is.workflow.actions.setvariable.name: Set Variable
sampleShortcuts: Add to List and Otherwise If
is.workflow.actions.setvariable.summary: Sets the value of the specified variable to the input of this action.

is.workflow.actions.showresult.name: Show Content
is.workflow.actions.showresult.summary: Shows a preview of the provided content. If run from Siri, speaks the provided text.
